title: 17-sai Kara Yarinaosu Propose
titleNative: 17歳からやり直すプロポーズ
synopsis: "If only I had met you when we were in high school…" Osamu’s girlfriend refused his proposal with these mysterious words. And then after an accident, he time-leaps back to his high school days. He tries to find her and make her fall in love with him again, but when he meets her, he finds out that she has a twin sister…!? (Source: Comic Trail, translated)
searchTerms: 17歳からやり直すプロポーズ
synonyms: Marriage proposal to start from 17 years old.

title: Transformers Legends
titleNative: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ
synopsis: Starting off as 4koma and published online to promote the titular Transformers Legends toyline, with special Bonus Edition (出張版 Shutchōban) chapters of the comic packed with the toys themselves, it Initially showcased the misadventures of the Beast Wars cast re-imagined as adult Transformers fans, before eventually taking a more story-driven approach and attempting to connect all the entries of the Japanese Generation 1 anime and manga continuity into one storyline. Heavily marketed towards adult collectors and otaku in the face of the brand's dwindling popularity with children after TakaraTomy's largely unsuccessful first attempt in the mid-2000s, it attempted to change the image of the Transformers franchise, with much more "adult", often ecchi-filled humour and numerous references to fan culture. Ulltimately concluded when TakaraTomy began a brand unification with Hasbro starting with Power of the Primes, deciding to mainly sell Hasbro toys as is with minimal changes to packaging. It was eventually succeeded by the more action-oriented Generations Selects Special Comic promoting Hasbro and TakaraTomy's joint Generations Selects imprint. (Source: TFwiki, edited)
searchTerms: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ

title: Vigilante 2
synopsis: After graduating from the Korean National Police University and becoming a detective, Ji-Yong is assigned to investigate a suspicious report and comes face-to-face with a nationwide jeonse scam. As he confronts criminals who slip through the cracks of the legal system without proper punishment, Ji-Yong begins to question the rules of vigilante justice he once set for himself. While pursuing the scam’s ringleaders, the four vigilantes receive a threat from someone who knows their true identities and begin to sense the looming presence of a far greater evil. (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Ie Tsukuri Skill de Isekai wo Ikinobiro
titleRomaji: Ie Tsukuri Skill de Isekai wo Ikinobiro
titleNative: 家つくりスキルで異世界を生き延びろ
synopsis: Another world is quite hard to understand! A fantasy of a hardworking girl's DIY struggle! One day, Kurisu, a girl who was born and raised in a remote area, learns that she has the [House Building Skill]. When her memories of being Kurisu Niina, a Japanese woman, come back to her, she decides to leave the remote area and become an adventurer. After a grueling journey, she arrives in the labyrinthine city of Garel, and tries to build her own house and enjoy living alone, but the officials tell her that people from other countries can't even live there permanently. Thinking, "If so, let's make a house where you can travel!", she remodels a used carriage and begins to make an ideal home. Now begins the story of a girl who lives single-mindedly in a different world where her life depends on her skills! Note: Includes 1 extra chapter.

title: Chenyuan
synopsis: To investigate a kidnapping case, Xue Zhao, a profiler, went deep into a village of a foreign race, but was haunted by the villager's worship of [Him]. The pale face of Ji Li was looming, and his cold and wet long hair followed him like a shadow. Is the grace He bestowed a gentle killing intent or a bloody love word? The sacrifice He demanded was Xue Zhao's arrogant mind or his cold heart? Is the ghost you... or me? (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Ochinai Yogore wo Boku wa Nanto Yobeba Yokatta noka
titleRomaji: Ochinai Yogore wo Boku wa Nanto Yobeba Yokatta noka
titleNative: 落ちない汚れを僕は何と呼べばよかったのか
synonyms: What Was I Meant to Call This Mess That Wouldn't Go Away?
synopsis: This world is filthy… Nakayama, a high school boy with an extreme case of germophobia, avoids all social interaction and tries to enjoy his private time alone in a perfectly clean space. But his peaceful days are constantly disrupted by Nishino-san, the cheerful and unpredictable girl who ends up sitting next to him. "Don’t pollute my sanctuary! Don’t intrude on my time!" Contrary to his wishes, day after day, Nakayama is at Nishino's mercy in this chatty rom-com about a germophobe and an unsophisticated high school girl!! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Meaheim
synopsis: Rotten fruit returns to the branch, and gold drips down like water, A land where events beyond reason occur, a land known as “Meichi” (The Underworld) that easily claims the lives of those who dare to enter. The scholar "Ren" arrives in this godforsaken land to save his sick younger brother. Together with the guide "Tobia", "Ren" embarks on a perilous journey to obtain the “panacea,” an ancient relic of “Meichi.” A genuine dark fantasy brought to you by "Tsurubuchi Kenji", creator of “Touge Oni,” and "Konata", a rising star of the Spanish comic world. (Source: Comic Days, translated)

title: Koppa Maichiru Sono Koro ni
titleNative: 木っ端舞い散る その頃に
synopsis: Kei Maebara gets a job!! The bizarre and eerie world of public service, depicted by Ryukishi07, from Higurashi When They Cry . In the 13th year of the Heisei era, in the Tokyo Metropolitan Area, Coastal Region... Due to the prolonged economic recession, the police force has weakened, and the growing number of disillusioned youth turning to semi-criminal lifestyles has led to a drastic decline in public safety... Amidst all this, Kei Maebara begins working at the district office. Can he become a respectable public servant? (Source: Akita Shoten, translated)
